mapper.sql: id, student_id, password, email, phone, nickname, real_name, department, avatar_url, role, credit_score, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM u_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM u_user WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND is_deleted = false LIMIT 1
